title: FileSystemSnapshot
description: A point-in-time image of the contents of a FlashBlade file system.

allOf.description: A built-in resource that exists on one or multiple arrays.

created.description: Creation time in milliseconds since UNIX epoch.

destroyed.description:
Indicates if this snapshot has been destroyed and is pending
eradication.

fqdn.description:
The fully qualified domain name of the appliance when `resource_type` is `arrays`,
`null` otherwise.

source.description: A reference to the file system that the snapshot was taken from.
source.title: FixedReference

suffix.description: Indicates the suffix of the snapshot.
